emails.subject: RE: document list
emails.body: RE: document list This looks great. I'll see if I can get someone to come up and copy this stuff for me. What is your office number? CF To: Freeland, Clint

emails.subject: RE: document list
emails.body: 3801a. Give me some advance warning so I'll have it marked. SS To: Shackleton, Sara

emails.subject: RE: document list
emails.body: I'll send up on of our assistants on Monday morning (around 9:00am) to start copying if that is convenient for you. Just let me know. CF To: Freeland, Clint
